prizes.label: Overall Pool Champion
prizes.desc: Most cumulative earnings, all four majors

prizes.label: Group Champion
prizes.desc: Most cumulative earnings within your group of 8

participants.name: Arif Nuraney
participants.blurb: Two majors, two different winners on your card — Rory at Augusta, Aaron Rai's PGA miracle at Aronimink. You're not leading the Coleclough Cup, you're lapping it. Infuriatingly, actual skill may be involved.

participants.name: Matt Cavelti
participants.blurb: Riding Aaron Rai's PGA lottery ticket and Scheffler's quiet brilliance to second overall. Statistically the most dangerous man not named Arif — and you know it.

participants.name: Kevin Young
participants.blurb: Banked a monster Masters then watched the PGA happen to other people. Still third, but the lead is evaporating one quiet weekend at a time.

participants.name: Ali Pejman
participants.blurb: Front-loaded everything at Augusta and has been coasting on fumes ever since. Wyndham Clark is suddenly very much awake at Shinnecock — watch this space.

participants.name: Adam Hill
participants.blurb: Augusta hero, Aronimink ghost. Jason Day withdrew at Shinnecock — not ideal. Adam Scott is lurking at +8 and trending the wrong way.

participants.name: Michael O'Callaghan
participants.blurb: Rode Rory and a tidy Masters into the lead pack. Tyrrell Hatton bounced back with a R2 68 — things are looking up at Shinnecock.

participants.name: Jeff Williams
participants.blurb: Seventh overall and Keegan Bradley is somehow even par through 16 at Shinnecock. Max Homa still not in the field — some wounds don't heal.

participants.name: Jamie MacDougall
participants.blurb: Brian Harman is -1 thru 15 in R2 and making a quiet move. JJ Spaun is at +7 and barely clinging to the cut line. Rory carries on.

participants.name: Chris Cooper
participants.blurb: Jon Rahm shot 78 in R2 and is +6 for the tournament. That's a body blow. Scheffler is even par and moving — it's his tournament to save your US Open.

participants.name: Phil Kuzyk
participants.blurb: Sam Burns shot 68 in R2 and is T7 at -1. Robert MacIntyre is +4 and in cut danger. Scheffler still your anchor.

participants.name: Tom Edstrand
participants.blurb: JT shot 68 in R2 and is T7. Jordan Spieth is +3 and treading water. Kurt Kitayama is T36 — your US Open is quietly alive.

participants.name: Rob Pettit
participants.blurb: JT at T7, Tyrrell Hatton bouncing back with a 68, Justin Rose at T25. This roster is quietly having a solid Shinnecock.

participants.name: Jimmy Richmond
participants.blurb: Jon Rahm shot 78 in R2 — a genuine disaster. Ludvig Aberg is T25 at +1, Matsuyama is +4. Rahm giveth, Rahm taketh away.

participants.name: Sean Monahan
participants.blurb: Jason Day withdrew. Robert MacIntyre is +4 and in trouble. JT and Scheffler are your only hopes — at least they're both inside the top 15.

participants.name: Chris Kleaman
participants.blurb: Justin Rose and Ben Griffin both made the cut cleanly. Russell Henley is T25 after a tough R2. Cameron Young in progress — a solid Shinnecock so far.

participants.name: Phil Kinninmont
participants.blurb: Matt Fitzpatrick is T2 at -3. Sam Burns is T7. Jon Rahm imploded with a 78. Two steps forward, one Spaniard backward.

participants.name: Mike Richmond
participants.blurb: Xander Schauffele shot 66 in R2 and is T2 at -3. Maverick McNealy is T7 in progress. This is your best major in months.

participants.name: Gareth McDonnell
participants.blurb: Xander T2, Justin Rose T25, Tyrrell Hatton bouncing back. Shane Lowry is +6 and in cut danger. Three of six looking useful.

participants.name: Jon Greyell
participants.blurb: Scheffler in progress at even par. Viktor Hovland shot 69 in R2 but started at +6 — damage control mode. Si Woo Kim bounced back with a 69 as well.

participants.name: Jay Barre
participants.blurb: Justin Rose T25, Maverick McNealy T7 in progress, Chris Gotterup T60 — a mixed bag but nobody's missed the cut yet.

participants.name: Sean Fairburn
participants.blurb: Matt Fitzpatrick T2, Sam Burns T7, Ben Griffin T25 — three of six inside the top 25 after R2. Nicolai Hojgaard at +9 is the wet blanket.

participants.name: Rod Armstrong
participants.blurb: Jon Rahm's 78 in R2 is painful. Sam Burns T7 and Ludvig Aberg T25 keep things respectable. Robert MacIntyre at +4 is in danger.

participants.name: Nils Edstrand
participants.blurb: Bryson shot 75 in R2 and is +5 — will likely miss the cut. Scheffler is your lifeline. The hex continues.

participants.name: Hans Edstrand
participants.blurb: Xander T2 and Collin Morikawa T5 after a brilliant 65 — Hans is suddenly very relevant at Shinnecock. The Edstrand sandwich has filling.

participants.name: David Rose
participants.blurb: Rahm's 78 hurts badly. Sam Burns T7 is your saving grace. Ryo Hisatsune made the cut at even par — a pleasant surprise.

participants.name: Dino Konasewich
participants.blurb: Justin Rose T25, Maverick McNealy T7 in progress. JJ Spaun at +7 is on the cut bubble — holding your breath.

participants.name: Kit Matkaluk
participants.blurb: JT shot 68 in R2 and is T7. Patrick Cantlay is +6 — heading for the cut line. Cameron Young in progress and hovering at T36.

participants.name: David Puddicombe
participants.blurb: Jon Rahm shot 78. Bryson shot 75. Jason Day withdrew. Three of your six are gone or imploding. Patrick Reed at +4 is your best active score — a tough day at Shinnecock.

participants.name: Craig Langdon
participants.blurb: Collin Morikawa shot 65 in R2 and is T5. Ludvig Aberg at T25. Craig is having a quietly strong US Open after two quiet majors.

participants.name: Stephen Roberts
participants.blurb: Fitzpatrick T2, Morikawa T5, McNealy T7 in progress — three potential top-10 finishers. Stephen Roberts is having a sneaky good US Open.

participants.name: Nigel Coleclough
participants.blurb: It is literally YOUR cup and you're 31st. JT shot 68, Ben Griffin made the cut — small mercies. JJ Spaun at +7 remains a problem. Eponymously embarrassing.

participants.name: Hugh Cooper Jr.
participants.blurb: Xander T2, Fitzpatrick T2 — two of your six are co-leading the US Open field. Akshay Bhatia made the cut at even par. Quietly the best card in the bottom half.

participants.name: Dionne Delesalle
participants.blurb: Morikawa 65 in R2 is a gift. Jason Day withdrew. Adam Scott at +8. Justin Rose made the cut. Two steps forward, two steps sideways.

participants.name: Ted Reid
participants.blurb: JT shot 68 and is T7. Tommy Fleetwood T25. Robert MacIntyre at +4 is dangerously close to the cut. Ted is in the mix if those two deliver.

participants.name: Rob Snowden
participants.blurb: Collin Morikawa shot 65 and is T5. Cameron Young in progress at T36. Matt McCarty shot 80 in R2 — historic collapse. Morikawa is doing all the work, again.

participants.name: Mark Kaufmann
participants.blurb: Xander T2 and Tyrrell Hatton bouncing back with a 68. Robert MacIntyre at +4 is the worry. A better US Open than the last two majors combined.

participants.name: Mark Trotzuk
participants.blurb: Jason Day withdrew. JJ Spaun on the cut bubble. Justin Rose made the cut. Kurt Kitayama in progress at T36. A roster held together with tape and Kitayama.

participants.name: Jamie Finkbeiner
participants.blurb: Xander T2. Akshay Bhatia made the cut at even par — growth. Cameron Young in progress. Sepp Straka at +6 is the anchor around your ankle.

participants.name: Bryson Milley
participants.blurb: Collin Morikawa shot 65 in R2. Tommy Fleetwood T25. Keegan Bradley even par in progress. It is what it is — and right now it's quietly decent.

participants.name: JP Wright
participants.blurb: Bryson shot 75 and is +5. Tyrrell Hatton bounced back with a 68. Brooks Koepka at +9 in progress — heading for the cut. Maverick McNealy T7 is your best story.

participants.name: Stu Louie
participants.blurb: Xander T2 is keeping this alive. Brooks Koepka at +9 in progress — likely missing the cut. Akshay Bhatia made it to even par. Xander is the only adult in the room.

participants.name: Aaron Watson
participants.blurb: Jon Rahm shot 78 — your anchor just snapped. Tommy Fleetwood T25. Viktor Hovland shot 69 but started at +6. Shane Lowry at +6 is in cut danger.

participants.name: Darren Moscovitch
participants.blurb: Sam Burns T7 and Ludvig Aberg T25 are carrying this roster. Sepp Straka at +6 is in cut danger. Viktor Hovland shot 69 but started too far back.

participants.name: Chris Morrison
participants.blurb: Tommy Fleetwood T25. Russell Henley made the cut at +1. Sahith Theegala is even par and in progress. Sepp Straka at +6 is the problem.

participants.name: James Patillo
participants.blurb: Wyndham Clark is leading the US Open at -7. You have the tournament leader on your card and you're 45th. The season is a paradox.

participants.name: Chris MacDougall
participants.blurb: Akshay Bhatia made the cut at even par — progress. Robert MacIntyre at +4 is in danger. Cameron Young in progress. The PGA basement looks far away for now.

participants.name: Kevin Spooner
participants.blurb: Bryson shot 75 in R2 — the hex is real. Patrick Reed made the cut. Si Woo Kim shot 69 in R2 and is making a move. Quietly surviving.

participants.name: Geoff Stollery
participants.blurb: Matt Fitzpatrick T2 and Ludvig Aberg T25 — two live horses. Akshay Bhatia made the cut. Nicolai Hojgaard at +9 is your ballast.

participants.name: Chris Gibbins
participants.blurb: Bryson +5, Jason Day WD — two of six already gone. Keegan Bradley even par in progress. Jordan Spieth at +3 is still alive. Praying remains the strategy.

participants.name: Fraser Reid
participants.blurb: Tommy Fleetwood T25. JJ Spaun at +7 is on the bubble. Keegan Bradley even par in progress. Patrick Cantlay at +6 is fading. Six guys, one shared pulse.

participants.name: Chris Ellison
participants.blurb: Collin Morikawa shot 65 and is T5 — your sleeper just woke up. Tommy Fleetwood T25. Joaquin Niemann at T48 after a 65 in R2 — another late mover.

participants.name: Tim Kehler
participants.blurb: Matt Fitzpatrick T2 and Ben Griffin T25 — two solid cards. JJ Spaun at +7 remains on the bubble. Fitzpatrick might actually save this season.

participants.name: Theo Ong
participants.blurb: Matt Fitzpatrick T2 — your one live wire. JJ Spaun at +7 on the bubble. Rickie Fowler at +5 is heading for the exit. Fitzpatrick or bust.

participants.name: Russell Ball
participants.blurb: Maverick McNealy T7 in progress — your best story in months. Bryson +5 and heading out. Two Hojgaards both on the wrong side of the cut line.

participants.name: Tom Puddicombe
participants.blurb: JT shot 68 in R2 and is T7 — your lone hero. Tommy Fleetwood T25. Robert MacIntyre at +4 and Sepp Straka at +6 both in cut trouble. The Open better be kind.

participants.name: Chris Smiley
participants.blurb: Dead last. Bryson +5, Jason Day WD, Brooks Koepka at +9 in progress. Akshay Bhatia made the cut at even par — your only good news. The only direction left is up, mathematically.
